verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: By the night when it covers
verse.verse_2: And [by] the day when it appears
verse.verse_3: And [by] He who created the male and female,
verse.verse_5: As for he who gives and fears Allah
verse.verse_7: We will ease him toward ease.
verse.verse_8: But as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need
verse.verse_10: We will ease him toward difficulty.
verse.verse_11: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls?
verse.verse_13: And indeed, to Us belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].
verse.verse_14: So I have warned you of a Fire which is blazing.
verse.verse_15: None will [enter to] burn therein except the most wretched one.
verse.verse_16: Who had denied and turned away.
verse.verse_17: But the righteous one will avoid it -
verse.verse_18: [He] who gives [from] his wealth to purify himself
verse.verse_19: And not [giving] for anyone who has [done him] a favor to be rewarded
verse.verse_20: But only seeking the countenance of his Lord, Most High.
verse.verse_21: And he is going to be satisfied.
